data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the last lifecycle-event cursor.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the last lifecycle-event cursor for replay/recovery workflows. However, the evidence provided does not include any information regarding the existence or status of this cursor, nor does it confirm whether it meets the requirement. The only related evidence is the summary of the use case, which does not provide concrete details about the cursor's state or its relevance to the current saga lifecycle.
gaps: No evidence of the last lifecycle-event cursor for replay/recovery workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and status of the last lifecycle-event cursor.
